name: Shortcut MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Shortcut MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Shortcut (formerly Clubhouse) project management — creating, reading, and updating stories and epics, managing workflows and iterations, searching for stories, accessing member and team data, and integrating Shortcut project management into agent-driven sprint planning and engineering workflow automation.
use_cases: Creating and updating stories from engineering workflow agents
Querying sprint status and iteration data from project planning agents
Searching stories by assignee, state, or label from PM assistant agents
Automating story creation from CI/CD pipeline agents
Generating sprint summaries from reporting agents
Managing epics and workflow states from engineering management agents
not_for: Jira, Linear, or Asana users (use their respective MCPs)
best_when: An engineering team using Shortcut needs AI-assisted project management — automating story creation, sprint reporting, or workflow tracking.
avoid_when: Your team uses Jira, Linear, GitHub Projects, or another PM tool.

auth.notes: Shortcut API token required. Generate from Shortcut Settings > API Tokens. Single token with full account access — no fine-grained scopes available.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Shortcut: free for up to 10 users
pricing.notes: Shortcut has a generous free tier (10 users). API access available on all plans. Official MCP server from Shortcut.

known_agent_gotchas: API token has full account access — no granular scope control
Story IDs are workspace-specific — always reference by ID, not name
Workflow states are customizable per workspace — query available states before creating stories
Rate limit: 200 req/min — batch operations carefully
Official Shortcut MCP — higher quality and maintained by product team
Member and team references require workspace-specific IDs
agent_readiness.security_notes: API token auth — store in env var. Full account access token. HTTPS enforced. Official Shortcut MCP. SOC2 compliant service. Rotate token periodically.

security_score_components.security_notes: API token auth. HTTPS enforced. Full-access token (no scopes). SOC2. Official MCP. Store token in env var.
